title: celtis tetrandra subsp. sinensis
intro: Celtis tetrandra subsp. sinensis, also known as Chinese staff tree or Chinese ironplow, is a plant species in the family Cannabaceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
